sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Look at all nodes in the bottom-right grid area
seg = current_frame.segmentation
grid_nodes = []
for n in seg['nodes']:
    min_r = min(r for r,c in n['boundary'])
    min_c = min(c for r,c in n['boundary'])
    max_r = max(r for r,c in n['boundary'])
    max_c = max(c for r,c in n['boundary'])
    # Grid is roughly in the bottom-right area
    if min_r >= 40:  # bottom portion
        grid_nodes.append({
            'color': n['color'],
            'bbox': f"[{min_r},{min_c}]-[{max_r},{max_c}]",
            'pixels': n['pixels'],
            'hash': n['hash']
        })

print("Bottom area nodes:")
for n in grid_nodes:
    print(f"  {n}")

# Also look at the target pattern panel (bottom-left)
print("\nAll nodes summary:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    min_r = min(r for r,c in n['boundary'])
    min_c = min(c for r,c in n['boundary'])
    max_r = max(r for r,c in n['boundary'])
    max_c = max(c for r,c in n['boundary'])
    print(f"  color={n['color']}, bbox=[{min_r},{min_c}]-[{max_r},{max_c}], pixels={n['pixels']}, children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
